title: F-GT1 hardening: scale-free re-measurement at S390
expect: alpha still <2.0, orphan rate <10%, hub set stable

power_law.conclusion: NOT SCALE-FREE: alpha=1.645 < 2.0. Hub-spoke topology confirmed (hubs dominate more than classical scale-free). Trend: diverging_from_scale_free.

actual: N=695, alpha=1.645 (k_min=1), alpha=2.133 (k_min=2). Orphan 26.0% (rebound from S331 sprint). Giant 97.8%. K_avg=2.496. Hub regime shift: L-601 (60 in-degree, created S355) displaced L-001 (32) as dominant hub. All 60 L-601 citers are post-L-500. Orphan rate stable ~25% across all eras — S331 5.3% was citation-sprint anomaly. Tail (k>=2) IS scale-free at alpha=2.133; bulk k=0/1 inflation breaks overall fit.
diff: Expected alpha<2.0 — CONFIRMED (1.645). Expected orphan<10% — WRONG (26.0%), S331 5.3% was sprint artifact not structural. Expected hub stability — WRONG: L-601 displaced L-001 as top hub (did not exist at S331). New finding: k_min=2 alpha=2.133 IS scale-free — zero-inflated power law mixture model. New finding: L-601 accumulated 60 citations in ~200 lessons (30% citation rate) — structural enforcement theorem became the swarm's dominant attractor.

alpha_trajectory.interpretation: Diverging from scale-free. Hub concentration increasing faster than tail thickening. The more the swarm cites, the more it cites the same hubs.

dual_regime.interpretation: Zero-inflated power law. Bulk: ~25% lessons never cited (structural orphans). Tail: genuine scale-free preferential attachment. The graph is a mixture of an inert mass (uncited) and an active citation network (scale-free).

hub_regime_shift.interpretation: Structural enforcement theorem (L-601, Sharpe 9) became the swarm's most-cited lesson, displacing the founding lesson L-001. L-601 attracted citations 2x faster than L-001. Content determines hub formation more than age — pure fitness-driven preferential attachment.

orphan_rebound.interpretation: Natural orphan rate is ~25% across all eras. The S331 5.3% was artificial (lesson_quality_fixer.py sprint enriched Cites: headers). Without active enrichment, ~1/4 of lessons never get cited. This is a baseline structural property, not a failure.

analysis.hardening_verdict: CONFIRMED (3 waves). Alpha steadily diverges from scale-free range. Hub-spoke topology is the STABLE structural form. New insight: dual-regime (inert mass + scale-free tail) resolves the apparent contradiction between sub-scale-free alpha and power-law-like hubs.
